$description: Design tokens for undersight.ai — an AI underwriting platform for private credit. Light-first editorial design system with warm Graphite text, dual-font voice (Inter + DM Sans), and single chromatic accent in Amber Rust.

color.$description: Brand, surface, text, semantic, and dark mode color palette

graphite-900.$description: Primary text color. Warm dark charcoal, never pure black.

graphite-800.$description: Hover-dark states and emphasized interactive text.

graphite-700.$description: Secondary text, muted labels, footer body text, helper copy.

graphite-100.$description: Subtle background for alternating sections and content bands.

graphite-500.$description: Muted text color. Subdued but readable body copy on white backgrounds. WCAG AA compliant (4.6:1 on white).

cloud-zinc.$description: Primary structural line: 1px border for cards, inputs, dividers, nav bar.

cloud-zinc-light.$description: Lighter border for hover states on cards and interactive containers.

amber-rust.$description: Single chromatic accent. Reserved for CTAs, active states, section labels, interactive tags.

amber-rust-light.$description: Translucent warm wash for tag and pill backgrounds.

amber-rust-focus.$description: Translucent ring for focus outlines on inputs and interactive elements.

eucalyptus.$description: Success states and positive indicators only. Never decorative.

eucalyptus-light.$description: Translucent background for success badges and positive-state containers.

paper-white.$description: Default page background. Pure white canvas.

bg-surface.$description: Off-white surface for alternating content sections.

on-accent.$description: Text on Amber Rust buttons and surfaces. Always white.

error.$description: Form validation errors, destructive action warnings.

info.$description: Informational callouts and neutral status indicators.

dark.$description: Dark mode overrides via prefers-color-scheme: dark

bg.$description: Page background in dark mode. Replaces paper-white.

surface.$description: Card and elevated surface background in dark mode.

elevated.$description: Further-elevated surfaces in dark mode (dropdowns, modals, tooltips).

border.$description: Card borders and dividers in dark mode. Replaces cloud-zinc.

typography.$description: Type scale with dual-font voice: Inter (cv01, ss03) for headlines/UI, DM Sans for body, SF Mono for data/code

display-xl.$description: Hero headline. One per page. Inter with cv01, ss03.

display-lg.$description: Section opener. Inter with cv01, ss03.

display-md.$description: Sub-section head, CTA headline. Inter with cv01, ss03.

display-sm.$description: Card title, compact section head. Inter with cv01, ss03.

title-lg.$description: Feature card title. Inter with cv01, ss03.

title-md.$description: Smaller card title, intro label. Inter with cv01, ss03.

body-lg.$description: Lead paragraph, hero sub-headline. DM Sans.

body-sm.$description: Footer body, fine print. DM Sans.

ui-label.$description: Form labels, nav items, field labels. Inter with cv01, ss03. UI weight 510.

ui-button.$description: Button text. Inter with cv01, ss03.

nav-link.$description: Navigation menu items. Inter with cv01, ss03. UI weight 510.

caption.$description: Tag text, helper captions. Inter with cv01, ss03.

caption-uppercase.$description: Section eyebrow labels, all-caps markers. Inter with cv01, ss03.

data-display.$description: Stat numbers, KPI readouts. Monospace tier.

code.$description: Code blocks, terminal text. Monospace tier.

spacing.$description: 8px base grid with 2px and 4px sub-tokens for fine work. Section spacing at 80px desktop, 48px mobile.

xxs.$description: Fine-grained alignment: border offsets, icon spacing.

sm.$description: Base unit of the spacing grid.

xxl.$description: Card internal padding. Large component spacing.

section.$description: Vertical padding between major page bands at desktop.

section-mobile.$description: Vertical padding between major page bands on mobile.

borderRadius.$description: Border radius scale from tight (4px) to pill (9999px).

md.$description: Buttons, stat cards, standard interactive elements.

lg.$description: Solution cards, feature cards, content containers.

xl.$description: Hero illustration containers, large marquee cards.

shadow.$description: Border-first, shadow-rare elevation system. Shadows reserved for floating UI only.

transition.$description: Motion tokens for interactive state changes.

default.$description: Default transition for hover, focus, and interactive state changes.

zIndex.$description: Stacking order for layered UI elements.

layout.$description: Grid, container, and structural layout tokens.

max-content-width.$description: Maximum content width, centered with horizontal padding.

touch-target-min.$description: Minimum touch target size per WCAG on mobile.

mobile.$description: Below this: hamburger nav, 1-up cards, section padding 48px.

desktop.$description: 1024-1440px: full nav, 3-up cards, hero at full scale.
